name: wireboard-mcp
description: Query your WireBoard analytics in conversation. Real-time and historical visitor data, custom events, and per-site reports as MCP tools. Requires an API token from https://wireboard.io/dashboard/settings/api
long_description:
Official WireBoard MCP server. Lets LLM agents (Claude Desktop, Cursor, VS Code, etc.) query your real-time and historical analytics in conversation.

**Before installing: grab your API token.** Mint one at https://wireboard.io/dashboard/settings/api with the `analytics:read` and `live:read` abilities. The installer will prompt for it and store it securely in your OS keychain.

Includes ten tools that wrap the WireBoard REST and Live APIs: list sites, get account info, fetch period totals, time-series, daily history, dimension breakdowns, top URLs with filters, custom event queries, live visitor snapshots, and the dimensions catalogue. Built on top of the official @wireboard/api JavaScript SDK.

All tools are read-only and accept natural date ranges like "last 7 days" or "this month".

wireboard_token.title: WireBoard API Token
wireboard_token.description: Your WireBoard API bearer token. Mint one at https://wireboard.io/dashboard/settings/api with the analytics:read and live:read abilities. Stored securely in your OS keychain.
